grid.app_grid: grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 xl:grid-cols-5 gap-6

surfaces.card_default: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:border-emerald-200 transition-all duration-200
surfaces.card_interactive: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg hover:border-emerald-300 transition-all duration-300
surfaces.header: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200 sticky top-0 z-50

sidebar.active_item: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-900 font-medium relative before:absolute before:inset-y-0 before:left-0 before:w-1 before:bg-emerald-600 before:rounded-r

buttons.primary: bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-700 text-white shadow-sm font-medium rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:border-slate-300 text-slate-700 font-medium rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-emerald-50 hover:text-emerald-700 text-slate-600 font-medium rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors

inputs.default: border-slate-200 bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500/20 focus:border-emerald-500 rounded-lg
inputs.search: bg-slate-100 border-transparent focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500/20 focus:border-emerald-500 rounded-full px-6

badges.default: bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
badges.success: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

brand_logo.description: Refex Industries official logo. Use in the top left of the sidebar and any login/auth screens.

welcome_banner.description: Subtle green energy landscape with wind turbines. Use as a masked background for the 'Welcome' banner in the user App Launcher view, overlaid with a heavy white-to-transparent gradient (e.g., bg-gradient-to-r from-white via-white/80 to-transparent) so text remains readable.

icons.instructions: Use Lucide React icons. Stroke width 1.5 or 2 for clarity. For app icons, use varied colorful backgrounds with white icons, or realistic service logos if available.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure dark mode is completely disabled. Use only the light theme palette provided.
Implement the two distinct views (Admin and User) with clear sidebar navigation.
The sidebar must use the Refex logo provided in media.images.brand_logo.

The user dashboard (App Launcher) should feature a welcoming header utilizing the welcome_banner image, but critically, it must be overlaid with a heavy white gradient to ensure maximum readability of the 'Good morning' text and search bar.
Use generous padding (p-6, p-8) and 'Bento' style grid spacing (gap-6) for dashboard cards.
For the Admin dashboard, include quick stats (Total Users, Active Apps) and a sleek activity feed or access requests table.
Use Shadcn UI components for Tables, Buttons, Dialogs, Dropdowns, Cards, but heavily customize them to remove the default Vercel look (e.g., rounded-xl instead of default radius, softer borders).
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='admin-nav-dashboard', data-testid='app-card-jira').
Ensure all fonts (Outfit, Manrope) are correctly imported and applied via Tailwind config.
The layout should be a standard enterprise shell: Fixed sidebar (260px) + Fluid main content area with sticky top header.
